metadata.title: Helia — Repurpose content for social
metadata.description: Turn long-form content into Twitter threads, Instagram carousels, hooks, and CTAs.

home.headline: One draft. Threads, carousels, hooks, and CTAs.
home.subhead: Helia turns long-form content into structured social assets so you ship faster without losing your voice.
home.featureThreadsBody: Break ideas into tweet-sized beats that read as a single narrative.
home.featureCarouselsBody: Slide titles and bodies tuned for saves and shares on Instagram.
home.featureHooksBody: Openers that stop the scroll and a clear next step for readers.
home.footer: Helia — built with Next.js and Supabase.

auth.title: Sign in or sign up
auth.subtitle: Continue with email and password.
auth.errorAuth: Could not sign in. Try again or use email sign-in.
auth.signupSuccess: Your account was created. If email verification is required, check your inbox; then sign in.
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to the terms and privacy policy.

dashboard.title: Repurpose content
dashboard.subtitle: Turn one draft into social-ready formats.

repurpose.placeholder: Paste a blog post, newsletter, or transcript…
repurpose.emptyHint: Click Repurpose to send your text to the API and see outputs.

supabaseTest.title: Supabase connection test
supabaseTest.envMissing: Missing URL or anon key — copy .env.example to .env.local
